Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three cases We need to identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and interpret how their meaning changes Then rename them to reflect context

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets list all activities Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer Submit Additional Approve Request Adjust Account

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now look at each case C001 Initiate Request Verify Documents first time Call Customer first time Submit Additional Verify Documents second time Approve Request C002 Initiate Request Verify Documents first time Call Customer first time Adjust Account Call Customer second time Approve Request C003 Initiate Request Verify Documents first time Call Customer first time Adjust Account Verify Documents second time Approve Request

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activities that appear multiple times within the same case Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and C003 once in C002 Call Customer appears twice in C002

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Call Customer appears twice in C002 and C003 Actually in C003 it appears once Wait in C003 Call Customer appears once at step 3 In C002 it appears twice In C001 it appears once

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Verify Documents In C001 first verification occurs after initiating request Agent checks identity documents Then later after customer submits additional documents there is another verification Agent re checks documents now that ID scan is provided So the first verification is initial identity verification and the second is re verification after additional documents In C003 first verification Physical verification of ID Then later after adjusting account there is another verification Re verify docs after account adjustment So again first is initial verification second is re verification

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So for Verify Documents we can distinguish between Initial Verification first occurrence in the case Re verification after some action like submitting additional or adjusting account

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Call Customer In C001 first call Verification incomplete agent calls to request missing docs So its a call to request missing documents In C002 first call Outbound call to clarify account discrepancy Then second call Follow up call to confirm adjustments made So first call is for clarification second is confirmation In C003 first call Customer stepped out Officer calls to have them return So its a call to recall customer to the branch

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Verify Documents First occurrence Verify Documents Initial or Initial Document Verification Second occurrence Verify Documents Re verification or Re verify Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In C002 there is only one verification so it is initial In C001 the second verification occurs after Submit Additional In C003 the second verification occurs after Adjust Account So we can use Verify Documents Re verification for both

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Call Customer C001 Call Customer Request Missing Docs C002 first call Call Customer Clarify Discrepancy C002 second call Call Customer Confirm Adjustments C003 Call Customer Recall Customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Other activities Initiate Request appears only once per case Submit Additional appears only in C001 Adjust Account appears in C002 and C003 Approve Request appears only once per case no need to rename

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we need to present the revised event log with renamed activities
